description:
Personalized 2D Acrylic Ornament
✨ Bring your memories to life with a sleek, modern ornament that pops with color and razor-sharp detail. Perfect for the tree or year-round décor—and a thoughtful gift for Christmas, Valentine's Day, birthdays, and more.

Why You'll Love It:
📸 Personalized, edge-to-edge print: Captures even the finest details with exceptional accuracy.
💡 Vivid & long-lasting: UV printing delivers bright, fade-resistant artwork that resists everyday wear.
💎 Premium build: 3 mm-thick acrylic—strong, durable, and beautifully glossy.
🪶 Lightweight: Easy to hang without weighing down branches.
🎁 Gift-ready: Comes with a hanging string and an elegant gift box.

Specs:
• Material: 3 mm acrylic sheet
• Technology: High-definition UV printing
• Size: 3.5"–4.5" (varies by design/shape)
• Included: 1 ornament + hanging string + gift box
